executionNotes: Evidence IDs resolve to docs/stabilization/validation-evidence.json. Passed means the stated contract was exercised within the listed methods and audit scope; it is not a claim of exhaustive defect absence.

cases.scenario: fresh database bootstrap does not disclose credentials and creates forced-rotation accounts atomically
valid login succeeds while unknown, wrong-password, disabled, and deleted accounts share one failure response
temporary credential forces password change and protected pages/APIs remain blocked until rotation
logout destroys the cookie and browser refresh/back cannot restore authenticated access
reset, password change, role change, disablement, and deletion revoke retained cookies uniformly across all protected methods
development bypass is loopback-only and rejected in test, production build/start, and non-loopback configurations
Viewer can use session-gated reads but receives 403 for all Admin-gated route/method combinations
direct Admin page access redirects safely and role-appropriate navigation exposes no impossible action
Measure creation validates identity, category, type, frequency, and required metadata and persists once
safe Measure metadata editing persists and creates an immutable audit snapshot
calculation-semantic edits with history require a compatible effective-dated successor; archive/restore preserves history
deletion refuses dependent values, records permitted lifecycle deletion atomically, and uses archive/restore where recovery applies
monthly and quarterly entry accepts only valid period indexes and selected-cycle data
annual, cumulative, and one-time entry uses internal index zero without showing month zero
duplicate or repeated submission cannot create duplicate logical observations or audit success
all supported input shapes reject malformed, non-finite, incomplete, out-of-range, and incompatible data while preserving draft
multi-input and distribution saves commit atomically with audit or roll back completely
successful save and checklist completion persist after reload and a new session
dirty or stale form warns before navigation; server/network failure retains draft and supports retry
rapid repeated save is suppressed and documented last-write behavior does not corrupt records
entry and strategic audit history retain actor, immutable labels, tombstones, rename/delete context, filters, and pagination
current-year and comparison-year values use the same reporting cycle and correct direction-aware meaning
January-through-selected-month cumulative and YTD calculations include no later or prior-year periods
percentage increase/decrease is (current-previous)/abs(previous) with correct sign and percentage-point distinction
zero denominators yield explicit invalid state without NaN, Infinity, crash, or implicit zero
missing prior-year values yield missing state and do not invent a baseline
supported negative and decimal values remain finite, preserve cents/precision, and follow direction rules
month, quarter, current-year, plan-year, leap/calendar, and effective-year boundaries select the intended records
numeric zero Target remains valid and distinct from missing/draft/unsupported Target
annual pacing, annual completion, and full-plan progress remain separate with uncapped text and capped fill
year/period/report/attention/activity filters and stable list ordering survive selection and pagination
Admin sees four destinations, Viewer sees two, mobile order matches desktop, and supporting drill-downs are not destinations
URL-backed state, refresh, direct links, and browser back/forward preserve reporting context without stale UI
malformed years, periods, report views, areas, slugs, and query parameters fall back or fail safely
all removed pages and legacy mutation routes return 404 for direct access and every method
each public route has a structure-mirroring skeleton with accessible loading semantics and reduced-motion behavior
fresh/empty and partial databases render honest role-appropriate empty or partial states without crashing
four destination error boundaries focus an assertive heading, suppress duplicate retry, recover safely, and restore main focus
Board and Trends URL selection loads only the visible report and uses strategic observations for selected period/year
Board and Trends CSV copy the sanitized visible model exactly with stable identity and escaping
PNG and PDF are nonblank, dimension-safe, complete, readable, and restore DOM after success or failure
print hides app chrome, preserves all report evidence/context, and avoids clipping or color-only meaning
all destinations and drill-downs reflow at 320-1920px and 200%-400% zoom without collisions, clipping, or page overflow
keyboard-only use covers skip link, navigation, forms, dialogs/drawers, exports, focus trap, and opener restoration
landmarks, headings, labels, errors, tables, charts, progress, statuses, and live regions expose correct screen-reader semantics
reduced motion removes translation/scale and animated progress while retaining all semantic feedback
focus, text, placeholder, state, chart, and print meaning meet contrast and non-color requirements
missing database initializes safely; disposable seed is deterministic and preserves users on reseed
schema 9/10 migration to 11 is additive, idempotent, atomic, preserves IDs/data/customization, and leaves foreign_key_check empty
production build/typecheck succeeds with bypass cleared and fails closed if bypass is explicitly enabled
production container builds without embedded DB/secrets, starts against a private DB, and passes authenticated smoke
Vercel preview builds and preserves auth/database-safe behavior within the platform's persistence limits
Fly production-equivalent startup uses persistent SQLite path, trusted proxy attribution, additive migration, and credentialed smoke
OSV dependency scan has no actionable vulnerability under repository policy
Gitleaks scan has no unreviewed secret and exact suppressions remain bounded
Semgrep repository policy has no actionable finding and required rules execute
CodeQL JavaScript/TypeScript and Python checks succeed on the exact baseline and stabilization head
